member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum
member.summary: Represents the different types of documents that can be classified.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.ID
member.summary: Represents an identification document.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.DriversLicense
member.summary: Represents a driver's license document.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.Passport
member.summary: Represents a passport document.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.MeterReadings
member.summary: Represents a photo or image with meter readings.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.MeterExchangeVoucher
member.summary: Represents a meter exchange voucher.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.DeliveryReport
member.summary: Represents a delivery report.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.AuthorizationForm
member.summary: Represents an authorization form.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.Complaint
member.summary: Represents a complaint.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.Letter
member.summary: Represents a letter.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.DebtOrFinancialAssistance
member.summary: Represents a financial assistance power of attorney or order.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.JudicialDocument
member.summary: Represents judicial documents (e.g., information request authority, declaration of health).

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.SDN
member.summary: Represents other Service Desk Survivors (SDN) documents.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.DocumentTypesEnum.Unknown
member.summary: Represents an unknown document type.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum
member.summary: Represents the different types of heating systems.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.CVKetel
member.summary: Central heating boiler.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.HybridHeatPump
member.summary: Hybrid heat pump.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.FullElectricHeatPump
member.summary: Fully electric heat pump.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.AirHeating
member.summary: Air heating system.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.AirConditioning
member.summary: Air heating system.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.CityHeat
member.summary: City heating system.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.SharedHeating
member.summary: Shared heating system.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.OwnHeatSource
member.summary: Shared heating system.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.OtherHeatingSetup
member.summary: Other heating setup.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.HeaterTypesEnum.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown heating system.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum
member.summary: Enum representing the names of various plugins.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum.PIIRemoval
member.summary: Plugin for removing Personally Identifiable Information (PII).

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum.Classification
member.summary: Plugin for classifying data.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum.ConversationSummarisation
member.summary: Plugin for summarizing conversations.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum.ConversationLastStoryExtractor
member.summary: Plugin for extracting the information concerning the last story from a conversation.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.PluginNamesEnum.UserStoryCreation
member.summary: Plugin to create user stories from input requirements.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum
member.summary: Represents the different types of sensitive or unwanted data that can be classified.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.BSN
member.summary: BSN (Burgerservicenummer, Dutch social security number).

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.ChildrenUnder16
member.summary: Information about children under 16 years old.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.EthnicOrigin
member.summary: Ethnic origin.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.PoliticalOpinions
member.summary: Political opinions.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.ReligiousOrPhilosophicalBeliefs
member.summary: Religious or philosophical beliefs.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.TradeUnionMembership
member.summary: Trade union membership.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.GeneticData
member.summary: Genetic data processing.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.BiometricData
member.summary: Biometric data for uniquely identifying a natural person.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.HealthData
member.summary: Data concerning health.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.SexLifeOrOrientation
member.summary: Data concerning a natural person's sex life or sexual orientation.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.CriminalConvictions
member.summary: Criminal convictions.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Enums.UnwantedDataTypesEnum.OffencesOrSecurityMeasures
member.summary: Offences or related security measures based on Article 6(1).

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Extensions.EnumExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for working with enumeration types.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Extensions.EnumExtensions.GetDescription(System.Enum)
member.summary: Retrieves the description of an enumeration value. If the enumeration value is decorated with a , the description from the attribute is returned. Otherwise, the string representation of the value is returned.
member.returns: The description of the enumeration value if a is present; otherwise, the string representation of the enumeration value.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided enumeration value is null.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Extensions.EnumExtensions.GetFormattedDescriptionList``1
member.summary: Generates a formatted string listing all values of the specified enumeration type along with their descriptions.
member.returns: A formatted string listing all enumeration values and their descriptions.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding LlmUtils services to the IServiceCollection.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLlmUtils(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Options.KernelOptions})
member.summary: Adds LlmUtils services to the IServiceCollection.
member.param: The IServiceCollection to add services to.
An optional action to configure KernelOptions.
member.returns: The updated IServiceCollection.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers
member.summary: Provides helper methods for executing chat prompts.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers.ExecutePromptAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent},System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes a chat prompt asynchronously.
member.param: The kernel to use for executing the prompt.
Image content to include in the prompt.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the response as a string.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers.ExecutePromptAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent},System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes a chat prompt asynchronously.
member.param: The kernel to use for executing the prompt.
Image content to include in the prompt.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the response as a string.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers.ExecutePromptAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.String,System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes a chat prompt asynchronously.
member.param: The kernel to use for executing the prompt.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the response as a string.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers.ExecutePromptAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.String,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent,System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes a chat prompt asynchronously with a single image.
member.param: The kernel to use for executing the prompt.
Image content to include in the prompt.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the response as a string.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.ChatHelpers.ExecutePromptAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatCompletion.ChatHistory,System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes a chat prompt asynchronously using a pre-built chat history.
member.param: The kernel to use for executing the prompt.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the response as a string.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.CustomerJourneyHelper
member.summary: Helper class for exposing different customer journey classifications.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.CustomerJourneyHelper.GetMainJourneys
member.summary: Gets a distinct list of customer journey classifications.
member.returns: An of distinct classification strings.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.CustomerJourneyHelper.GetSubcategories(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the subcategories for a given classification.
member.param: The classification to filter subcategories by.
member.returns: An of subcategory strings.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.CustomerJourneyHelper.GetJourneysSubcategories
member.summary: Gets a formatted string of all main journeys and their subcategories.
member.returns: A formatted string of main journeys and their subcategories.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.CustomerJourneyHelper.GetAllCustomerJourneys
member.summary: Gets a list of customer journey classifications.
member.returns: An of objects.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.PluginHelpers
member.summary: Provides helper methods for plugin operations.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.PluginHelpers.GetPluginDirectoryPath
member.summary: Gets the directory path for the plugin library.
member.returns: The plugin directory path.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.PluginHelpers.ExecutePluginAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a plugin asynchronously. Plugin must be registered with the param. This function will attempt to execute a function of the same name as the plugin.
member.param: The name of the plugin to execute. Should correspond to a plugin defined in the PluginLibrary.
The input parameters for the plugin.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the invocation result.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper
member.summary: Helper methods for working with Azure Text Analytics API, including automatic chunking for large texts.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.RemovePiiAsync(Azure.AI.TextAnalytics.TextAnalyticsClient,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes PII from text using Azure Text Analytics. Automatically handles large texts by chunking.
member.returns: The anonymized text with PII entities replaced with [CATEGORY] markers.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.RemovePiiWithAsterisksAsync(Azure.AI.TextAnalytics.TextAnalyticsClient,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes PII from text and replaces entities with asterisks.
member.returns: The anonymized text with PII entities replaced with asterisks.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.SplitIntoChunks(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits text into chunks at sentence boundaries to maintain context.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.ProcessSentence(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes a single sentence and adds it to chunks as needed.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.ShouldStartNewChunk(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines if a new chunk should be started.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.AddCurrentChunkIfNotEmpty(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Adds current chunk to list if it has content and clears it.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.SplitLongSentenceByWords(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits a long sentence into word-based chunks.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.AddRemainingChunk(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Adds any remaining text in the current chunk.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.HandleEmptyChunks(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Handles the case where no chunks were created by splitting by character count.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.RedactPii(System.String,Azure.AI.TextAnalytics.PiiEntityCollection)
member.summary: Redacts PII entities by replacing them with [CATEGORY] markers.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Helpers.TextAnalyticsHelper.RedactPiiWithAsterisks(System.String,Azure.AI.TextAnalytics.PiiEntityCollection)
member.summary: Redacts PII entities by replacing them with asterisks.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.AudioTranscriptionResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of an audio transcription.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.AudioTranscriptionResponse.Transcription
member.summary: The transcription of the audio.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.AudioTranscriptionResponse.AudioLength
member.summary: The length of the transcribed audio.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.CustomerJourneyClassification
member.summary: Represents a customer journey classification.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The id of the category-subcategory pair.
The main topic of the customer journey classification.
The specific classification of the customer journey.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.CustomerJourneyClassification.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a customer journey classification.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The id of the category-subcategory pair.
The main topic of the customer journey classification.
The specific classification of the customer journey.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.CustomerJourneyClassification.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier for the customer journey classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.CustomerJourneyClassification.Classification
member.summary: Gets or sets the main topic of the customer journey classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.CustomerJourneyClassification.Subcategory
member.summary: Gets or sets the specific classification of the customer journey.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.InvalidClassification
member.summary: Represents an invalid customer journey classification.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.InvalidClassification.#ctor
member.summary: Represents an invalid customer journey classification.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.HeaterTypeClassificationResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of a heater type classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.HeaterTypeClassificationResponse.HeaterType
member.summary: The most likely recognised heater type. If there is uncertainty, HeaterTypeAlt provides an alternative.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.HeaterTypeClassificationResponse.HeaterTypeAlt
member.summary: Alternative classifications for the recognised heater type, if the primary classification is uncertain.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.HeaterTypeClassificationResponse.Reason
member.summary: The reason for the classification.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmInvocationResult
member.summary: Wrapper around the result of a LLM invocation, meant to centralize the result of LLM invocations, which are executed in different ways and produce different result types.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmInvocationResult.Content
member.summary: String content returned by the LLM invocation.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmInvocationResult.RenderedPrompt
member.summary: The final prompt that was rendered to the LLM.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmInvocationResult.TotalCost
member.summary: The total cost associated with the LLM invocation.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataEntry
member.summary: Internal model entry for LLM output representing a single unwanted data evaluation.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataEntry.UnwantedDataType
member.summary: The unwanted data type evaluated.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataEntry.IsPresent
member.summary: Whether the type is present in the document.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataEntry.Reason
member.summary: Reasoning for the assessment.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataMatrix
member.summary: Internal model representing the full matrix returned by the LLM for unwanted data classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataMatrix.DocumentType
member.summary: The type of document being classified.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataMatrix.DocumentTypeReasoning
member.summary: The reasoning behind the document type classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.LlmUnwantedDataMatrix.UnwantedData
member.summary: Flat list of entries, one per unwanted data type.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument
member.summary: Represents a document that has been parsed into its constituent parts for AI processing.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.TextContent
member.summary: The extracted text content from the document.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.Images
member.summary: The extracted images from the document (including PDF pages converted to images).

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.DocumentExtension
member.summary: The original document extension for reference.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.FromImages(System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a ParsedDocument with only images (for image files).

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.FromTextAndImages(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a ParsedDocument with text and images (for Word documents).

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument.FromSingleImage(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a ParsedDocument with only a single image (for simple image files).

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.RecognizedUnwantedDataType
member.summary: Represents unwanted data recognized in a document.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.RecognizedUnwantedDataType.UnwantedDataType
member.summary: The type of unwanted data recognized.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.RecognizedUnwantedDataType.Reason
member.summary: The reason for the classification of the unwanted data.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode
member.summary: Codes for requirements used to evaluate claims across general and type-specific rules.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.General_ClearAndUnambiguous
member.summary: Is the claim clear and unambiguous?

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.General_FactuallyCorrectWithEvidence
member.summary: Is the claim factually correct, with sufficient evidence?

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.General_NotMisleading
member.summary: Is the claim not misleading?

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Ambition_ClearlyLabeledAsAmbition
member.summary: It is clearly stated that this is an ambition/future goal (not the current situation).

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Ambition_ConcreteObjectiveVerifiableTargets
member.summary: Ambition is based on concrete, objective, and verifiable targets.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Ambition_PlansAndMeasuresPresent
member.summary: Plans and measures are described to support feasibility of the ambition.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Comparison_ReferenceClearlyIdentified
member.summary: The reference for the comparison (what/whom) is clearly identified.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Comparison_ComparableAndCompleteCharacteristics
member.summary: Products/services are comparable and all relevant characteristics are included.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Comparison_CurrentVerifiableNotMisleading
member.summary: The comparison is current, verifiable, and not misleading.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Label_IndependentAndReliable
member.summary: The label/certification is independent and reliable.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Label_OriginClearlyStated
member.summary: The origin of the label/certification is clearly stated.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementCode.Label_NoConfusingSelfCreatedLabel
member.summary: No self-created label that could cause confusion with recognized labels.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementViolation
member.summary: Describes a specific violation against a requirement code for a claim.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementViolation.Code
member.summary: The requirement that was violated.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.RequirementViolation.Message
member.summary: Human-readable message explaining the violation.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim
member.summary: Represents a single extracted sustainability claim and its classified type.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim.ClaimText
member.summary: The raw text of the claim as found in the content.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim.ClaimType
member.summary: The classified claim type.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim.RelatedText
member.summary: Additional surrounding text that provides context for the claim. Helpful to inform downstream checks (e.g., evidence or requirement evaluation).

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim.RelatedUrls
member.summary: Potential evidence URLs that are directly on or next to the claim (one click away). Extracted from the base HTML during claim extraction.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimComplianceEvaluation
member.summary: The evaluation result for a single sustainability claim, including per-requirement violations and a suggested alternative.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimComplianceEvaluation.Claim
member.summary: The claim that was evaluated.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimComplianceEvaluation.IsCompliant
member.summary: Whether the claim satisfies all applicable requirements. Returns true when there are no violations, false otherwise.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimComplianceEvaluation.Violations
member.summary: Detailed list of requirement violations (empty when compliant).

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimComplianceEvaluation.SuggestedAlternative
member.summary: Optional suggested alternative phrasing when the claim is non-compliant.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType
member.summary: The supported sustainability claim types identified on webpages or documents.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType.Unspecified
member.summary: The claim has not yet been classified into one of the supported types.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType.Regular
member.summary: A statement that a product, service, activity, or company has a positive, less harmful, or no impact on the environment or other sustainability aspects.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType.Ambition
member.summary: A statement about a future aim or goal regarding sustainability.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType.Comparison
member.summary: A statement comparing a product, service, or company to another in terms of sustainability.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType.LabelOrCertification
member.summary: The use of a certificate, quality label, or logo that suggests sustainability.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of a call to the unwanted data classification service.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse.DocumentType
member.summary: The type of document being classified.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse.DocumentTypeReasoning
member.summary: The reasoning behind the document type classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse.UnwantedData
member.summary: A dictionary containing the types of unwanted data identified in the document and their reasoning.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse.GetErrorClassificationResponse
member.summary: Creates an instance of with error values.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UserStoryCreationResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of a heater type classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UserStoryCreationResponse.UserStory
member.summary: Created user story.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UserStoryCreationResponse.MissingInfo
member.summary: Missing info useful to create the user story.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Options.TextAnalyticsOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Azure Text Analytics service.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Options.TextAnalyticsOptions.Endpoint
member.summary: The Azure Text Analytics endpoint URL.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Options.TextAnalyticsOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: The Azure Text Analytics API key.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.PluginLibrary.BsnExtraction.BsnRecognitionPlugin
member.summary: Legacy BSN recognition plugin. This functionality has been moved to UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService. This class is kept for backward compatibility and may be removed in future versions.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.PluginLibrary.BsnExtraction.BsnRecognitionPlugin.#ctor
member.summary: Legacy BSN recognition plugin. This functionality has been moved to UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService. This class is kept for backward compatibility and may be removed in future versions.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.PluginLibrary.BsnExtraction.BsnRecognitionPlugin.IsBSNAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the provided string is a valid BSN (Burgerservicenummer).
member.param: The candidate string to validate as BSN.
member.returns: True if the string is a valid BSN; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.PluginLibrary.BsnExtraction.BsnRecognitionPlugin.ExtractBsnFromPassportAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent)
member.summary: Extracts the BSN from a passport image. (Not implemented yet.)
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the extracted BSN as a string.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.PluginLibrary.BsnExtraction.BsnRecognitionPlugin.GetPassportExtractionChatHistory(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ImageContent)
member.summary: Returns the prompt used for extracting a BSN from a passport image.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService
member.summary: Service that combines audio transcription with automatic PII removal. This service handles large transcriptions by automatically chunking them before sending to Text Analytics.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService.#ctor(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WhisperTranscriptionService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the service with Whisper transcription only. PII removal will not be available unless Text Analytics client is configured.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService.#ctor(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WhisperTranscriptionService,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the service with both transcription and PII removal capabilities.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService.TranscribeAndRemovePiiAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Transcribes an audio file and optionally removes PII from the transcription. Automatically handles large transcriptions by chunking them to avoid Text Analytics API limits.
member.param: The path to the audio file to transcribe.
Whether to remove PII from the transcription. Default is true.
The language code for PII detection. Default is "en".
member.returns: The transcribed text, optionally with PII removed.
member.exception: Thrown when PII removal is requested but Text Analytics client is not configured.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService.TranscribeAndRedactPiiWithAsterisksAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Transcribes an audio file and removes PII, replacing entities with asterisks. Automatically handles large transcriptions by chunking them to avoid Text Analytics API limits.
member.param: The path to the audio file to transcribe.
The language code for PII detection. Default is "en".
member.returns: The transcribed text with PII replaced by asterisks.
member.exception: Thrown when Text Analytics client is not configured.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.AudioTranscriptionWithPiiRemovalService.TranscribeOnlyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Transcribes an audio file without PII removal.
member.param: The path to the audio file to transcribe.
member.returns: The raw transcribed text.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ConversationSummarisationService
member.summary: Provides functionality to summarise conversations into concise summaries.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ConversationSummarisationService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel)
member.summary: Provides functionality to summarise conversations into concise summaries.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ConversationSummarisationService.SummariseConversationAsync(System.String,System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Summarises a conversation in a few sentences.
member.param: Optional. Instructions describing what the summary should focus on.
Optional. List of examples and length in sentences, illustrating the desired format of the summary.
member.returns: The sanitized text.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.CustomerJourneyClassificationService
member.summary: Provides a service for classifying a conversation in a customer journey. A customer journey has a main customer journey type and a subcategory.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.CustomerJourneyClassificationService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ConversationSummarisationService)
member.summary: Provides a service for classifying a conversation in a customer journey. A customer journey has a main customer journey type and a subcategory.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.CustomerJourneyClassificationService.ClassifyConversationInCustomerJourneyAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Classifies a conversation in a customer journey. A list of customer journeys can be found here: TODO
member.param: Whether to use to use a summary or the full conversation in the classification LLM calls. Can be usefull if conversations are too large.
Two step classification first classifies the main topic with a first LLM call, then the corresponding subcategory in another.
member.returns: The sanitized text.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser
member.summary: Implementation of document parser that handles various document formats.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser.ParseDocumentAsync(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parses a document into its constituent parts (text and images).
member.param: The document extension (pdf, docx, png, etc.).
member.returns: A parsed document containing text and image content.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser.ParsePdfDocumentAsync(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parses a PDF document by converting it to images.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser.ParseWordDocument(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Parses a Word document by extracting text and embedded images.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser.ParseImageDocument(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Parses an image document by creating ImageContent.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.DocumentParser.ConvertPdfToImagesAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Converts PDF pages to ImageContent objects using PDFsharp. Moved from ChatHelpers to centralize document parsing logic.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.IDocumentParser
member.summary: Interface for parsing documents into a standardized format for AI processing.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.IDocumentParser.ParseDocumentAsync(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parses a document into its constituent parts (text and images).
member.param: The document extension (pdf, docx, png, etc.).
member.returns: A parsed document containing text and image content.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.HeaterRecognitionService
member.summary: Provides a service for extracting the heater type from an image.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.HeaterRecognitionService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel,GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.IImageValidationService)
member.summary: Provides a service for extracting the heater type from an image.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.HeaterRecognitionService.ValidateImageBytes(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the provided image bytes represent a valid image file.
member.param: File type of the image (png, jpg...).
member.returns: True if the image is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.HeaterRecognitionService.ExtractHeaterType(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the heater type of a given input image.
member.param: File type of the image to classify (png, jpg...).
member.returns: The recognized heater type along with an explanation.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.IImageValidationService
member.summary: Interface for image validation services.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.IImageValidationService.IsValidImageBytes(System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the provided image bytes represent a valid image file.
member.param: The filename including extension for validation.
The MIME content type of the image.
member.returns: True if the image is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.IImageValidationService.IsValidImage(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the provided base64 string represents a valid image.
member.param: The base64 image string to validate.
member.returns: True if the image is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ImageValidationService
member.summary: Service for validating image files based on content type, file signature, and size.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ImageValidationService.IsValidImageBytes(System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the provided image bytes represent a valid image file.
member.param: The filename including extension for validation.
The MIME content type of the image.
member.returns: True if the image is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ImageValidationService.IsValidImage(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the provided base64 string represents a valid image.
member.param: The base64 image string to validate.
member.returns: True if the image is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.PIIRemovalService
member.summary: Service to remove Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from text.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.PIIRemovalService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel)
member.summary: Service to remove Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from text.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.PIIRemovalService.AnonymiseContentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from a given text.
member.returns: The sanitized text.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim
member.summary: Represents a single extracted sustainability claim and its classified type.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim.ClaimText
member.summary: The raw text of the claim as found in the content.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim.ClaimType
member.summary: The classified claim type.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim.Reasoning
member.summary: The reasoning behind the claim classification.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim.RelatedText
member.summary: Additional surrounding text that provides context for the claim. Useful when the main claim text is short or when nearby text may support evidence checks in subsequent steps.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.RecognisedSustainabilityClaim.RelatedUrls
member.summary: Potential evidence URLs that are directly on or next to the claim (one click away). These are initially extracted from the base HTML content.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimCompliancEvaluationResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of a call to the sustainability claims extraction service.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimCompliancEvaluationResponse.Violations
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of requirement violations found during the compliance evaluation.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimCompliancEvaluationResponse.SuggestedAlternative
member.summary: Gets or sets the suggested alternative text that complies with sustainability claim requirements.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimEvidenceCheckResponse
member.summary: Structured response for evaluating whether provided content offers sufficient evidence for a claim.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimEvidenceCheckResponse.ProvidesEvidence
member.summary: Indicates whether the evidence content provides sufficient support for the claim.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimEvidenceCheckResponse.Reason
member.summary: Short explanation about the decision.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimsExtractionResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of a call to the sustainability claims extraction service.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SemanticModels.SustainabilityClaimsExtractionResponse.Claims
member.summary: The extracted sustainability claims.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge
member.summary: Centralized knowledge strings for sustainability claim types and requirement descriptions. Useful for prompt engineering and consistent messaging.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge.ClaimTypeDescriptions
member.summary: Maps claim types to natural-language descriptions and examples.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge.RequirementDescriptions
member.summary: Maps requirement codes to concise, consumable descriptions for checks and prompts.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge.GeneralRequirements
member.summary: General requirements that apply to all sustainability claims.

member.name: F:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge.TypeSpecificRequirements
member.summary: Type-specific requirements that apply in addition to general requirements.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimKnowledge.GetApplicableRequirements(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimType)
member.summary: Gets all applicable requirements for a given claim type (general + type-specific).
member.returns: A combined set of all applicable requirement codes.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService
member.summary: Provides semantic (AI-based) operations for sustainability claims.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel)
member.summary: Provides semantic (AI-based) operations for sustainability claims.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService.ExtractSustainabilityClaimsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extract all sustainability claims and their types from the provided content.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A list of extracted claims with their classified types.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService.EvaluateSustainabilityClaimComplianceAsync(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates whether a sustainability claim meets compliance requirements for its type.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A compliance evaluation containing any violations and suggested alternatives.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService.DoesContentProvideEvidenceForClaimAsync(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaim,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines whether the provided content supplies sufficient, accessible evidence supporting the claim.
member.param: Normalized content fetched from a related URL (one click away).
member.returns: True if content provides evidence for the claim; otherwise false.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsService
member.summary: Provides the orchestration and pluggable steps for checking sustainability claims on a webpage or document according to ACM/CDR/UCPD-aligned requirements.
member.param: Service that fetches and normalizes webpage content.
Service that extracts sustainability claims and evaluates their compliance.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsService.#ctor(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.IWebContentNormalizationService,GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsSemanticService)
member.summary: Provides the orchestration and pluggable steps for checking sustainability claims on a webpage or document according to ACM/CDR/UCPD-aligned requirements.
member.param: Service that fetches and normalizes webpage content.
Service that extracts sustainability claims and evaluates their compliance.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsService.CheckSustainabilityClaimsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Main orchestration entry point. Intended flow: 1) Fetch and normalize content from the URL 2) Extract sustainability claims and their types 3) Evaluate claims against general and type-specific requirements; propose alternatives 4) Aggregate results and return
member.param: The URL of the page to analyze.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The overall sustainability check result.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService
member.summary: Provides semantic (AI-based) operations for unwanted data classification.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel)
member.summary: Provides semantic (AI-based) operations for unwanted data classification.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService.ClassifyUnwantedDataAsync(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs the initial classification of unwanted data in a document using AI.
member.param: The parsed document containing text and images.
member.returns: The classification result.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService.ExtractBsnFromDocumentAsync(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extracts BSN from a document using AI with multiple attempts to mitigate hallucinations.
member.param: True if the document is an image of a passport.
member.returns: The first non-empty extracted BSN or empty string if none found.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationService
member.summary: Provides a service for recognizing unwanted data in documents with additional validation logic.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The semantic service for AI operations.
The document parser for handling various file formats.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationService.#ctor(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationSemanticService,GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.DocumentParsing.IDocumentParser)
member.summary: Provides a service for recognizing unwanted data in documents with additional validation logic.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The semantic service for AI operations.
The document parser for handling various file formats.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationService.CheckForUnwantedData(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a document contains unwanted data, such as PII or sensitive information. Performs additional validation for BSN data when detected.
member.param: The extension of the document to check (png, jpg, pdf...).
member.returns: The classification result.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UnwantedDataClassification.UnwantedDataClassificationService.ValidateBsnDataAsync(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.UnwantedDataClassificationResponse,GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Models.ParsedDocument,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates BSN data in the document and updates the response accordingly.
member.param: True if the document is a passport.
member.returns: The updated classification response.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UserStoryCreationService
member.summary: Provides functionality to create user stories from input requirements.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UserStoryCreationService.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Kernel)
member.summary: Provides functionality to create user stories from input requirements.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.UserStoryCreationService.CreateUserStoryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a user story based on the provided requirements.
member.returns: The generated user story.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.IWebContentNormalizationService
member.summary: Fetches webpage content and normalizes it into LLM-friendly plain text.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.IWebContentNormalizationService.FetchAndNormalizeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches the content at the specified URL and returns a cleaned, normalized text.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Normalized, LLM-ready text extracted from the webpage.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService
member.summary: Default implementation that fetches a webpage and converts it into normalized text for LLM consumption.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Default implementation that fetches a webpage and converts it into normalized text for LLM consumption.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleLineBreaksRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\n\\s*\\n\\s*\\n+
Explanation:
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n' atomically at least once.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleSpacesRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[ \\t]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\t ] atomically at least once.

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WhisperTranscriptionService
member.summary: Provides transcription services using the Whisper model from Azure OpenAI.
member.remarks: This service utilizes the AzureOpenAIClient to transcribe audio files into text using the Whisper model.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WhisperTranscriptionService.#ctor(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Options.KernelOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Options holding endpoint and api key of the azure openai instance.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WhisperTranscriptionService.TranscribeAudioAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Transcribes the audio file at the specified path into text using the Whisper model.
member.param: The path to the audio file to be transcribed.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the transcribed text.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MultipleLineBreaksRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the MultipleLineBreaksRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MultipleLineBreaksRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MultipleLineBreaksRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MultipleLineBreaksRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MultipleLineBreaksRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
